title: Far-Side Hammer
setup: Black's king is wedged in the **a8** corner with your king on **b6** locking the diagonal flight squares.
hint: Slide the rook to the 8th rank from far away — your king on **b6** holds {{a7}} and {{b7}}.
explanation:
## The Idea

Another **K+R vs K corner mate**, this time with the rook delivering from the far side of the board. The king on b6 is at the *standard cage distance*, controlling the diagonal flight squares.

Play {{Rh8#}}.

Why is the king stuck?

- {{b8}} — covered by the rook on h8 (8th rank)
- {{a7}} — covered by your king on **b6**
- {{b7}} — covered by your king on **b6**
- The rook is too far for {{Kxh8}}
- Nothing can interpose on the 8th rank

> **Takeaway:** When mating with K+R, the rook can deliver from anywhere on the rank or file once the *king cage* is established. Distance doesn't weaken the mate.
